query: When was the Eiffel Tower completed? What year?
answer:
**The Eiffel Tower was completed on March 31, 1889.**[1][2][3][5][6]

This date marks the end of the main structural work, finished in a record **2 years, 2 months, and 5 days** after construction began on January 26-28, 1887.[1][2][3][5] Gustave Eiffel celebrated by leading officials to the top that day, though elevators were incomplete and the public opening occurred later on May 6 or 15, 1889.[2][4] All sources, including the official Eiffel Tower site and Wikipedia, consistently confirm 1889 as the completion year.[1][2][3][4][5][6]
